title: Speed sprint: ultra-common short words
description: Block 4 opener — drill the 10 most frequent English words at speed
text: the and you are for not but his she him her our you they the and you are for not but his she him her our you they the and you

tips.text: These ten words carry roughly a quarter of all English. Make them reflex and you've bought back time everywhere.
Don't think your way through these. Let the hands run; the thought only slows them down here.

tips.target: the and you are for not but his she him her our you they the

tips.text: The moment you glance down at the keys, you've lost the line. Start it again from the top.

tips.target: and you are for not but his she him her our you they the and you

character_tips.anna: Block 4 begins. Speed is memory and nerve together; both grow from here on.
character_tips.maxim: The commonest words there are. Own these and every page goes faster.
character_tips.knopych: Speed work. Stop thinking and let the hands go.
character_tips.klavochka: A light touch now, and trust in the hands. They know the way.
